title: MCP: A USB-C Port for AI
summary: Every AI app used to need its own custom plug for every tool. The Model Context Protocol replaces that mess with one standard connector - build once, plug in anywhere.

context.headline: One port, any tool
context.description: Before USB, every device had its own cable. Before MCP, every AI app needed a custom integration for every tool. The Model Context Protocol is an open standard that lets any AI app talk to any tool through one shared connector - and it is fast becoming how AI plugs into the world.
context.when: The emerging standard for connecting AI to everything
